elements.original_description: A cheerful cartoon person running energetically on a pure white background, arms outstretched toward a floating dollar bill.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a cheerful cartoon person running energetically, arms outstretched toward a floating dollar bill. Clean flat vector art on a pure white background, high contrast, no shading or gradients. The mood is bright and energetic to match the cause.

elements.original_description: The same cartoon person holding an empty wallet with a sad expression, surrounded by scattered coins on a pure white background.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of the same cartoon person holding an empty wallet with a sad expression, surrounded by scattered coins. Clean flat vector art on a pure white background, high contrast, no shading or gradients. The tone is somber to reflect the effect of spending.
